pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading to Spring Boot 3.x is required for compatibility with the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping 1.8 would result in incompatibility with the new JDK and Spring Boot 3.x requirements.

src/main/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to adopt Spring Boot 3.x default constructor injection behavior.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.

src/test/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.general_idea: Migrate test annotations and imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/com/orange/lo/sample/lo2io.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 runner and annotations are no longer supported or default, causing test execution failures or deprecation warnings.
